meta-description: Learn about brand name drugs by reviewing the definition in the HealthCare.gov Glossary.
title: Brand name (drugs)
excerpt: A drug sold by a drug company under a specific name or trademark and that is protected by a patent. Brand name drugs may be available by prescription or over the counter.
content: A drug sold by a drug company under a specific name or trademark and that is protected by a patent. Brand name drugs may be available by prescription or over the counter.
